core_mechanism: construction of a multiplicative, structure-preserving map (a ring homomorphism / 'genus'-type orientation) that transports a universal cobordism-type invariant algebra onto a target algebra generated by the formal group law of a one-dimensional algebraic group (an elliptic curve), carried out compatibly with a continuous symmetry-group (circle) action
brief_reason: The abstract states the paper's core is constructing a map of ring T-spectra MString_C --> EC that is the equivariant analogue of the sigma orientation, i.e. a multiplicative (ring-homomorphism) orientation into a theory built from an elliptic curve, done compatibly with the circle-group action.
